Need help with community and environmental issues?

Scroll to find out about how I can help

Please note that many agencies and organisations have formal complaints and appeals processes. I cannot intervene or help until these channels have been exhausted.

I am unable to intervene in situations where there is an ongoing police investigation or judicial process apart from assisting constituents (where possible) to obtain legal advice and representation.

No information or suggestions received from my team should be treated as formal legal or specialist advice.

How I can help:

  • Raise matters which impact York Outer on your behalf in the House of Commons.
  • Contact relevant departments or officials on your behalf to help with enquiries or complaints.
  • Write to Secretaries of State or Ministers regarding relevant issues once all other channels of enquiry have been exhausted.

What I can't do:

  • I cannot help in settling disputes between family members, neighbours or between yourself and an employer.
  • I cannot involve myself in legal processes or active police investigations or contest decisions made in a court of law.
  • Provide financial or business advice.

Priority contacts

These organisations can help with a range of issues.

Need to discuss your situation with me?

My team are available to review your situation and see what I can do to assist your matter.

Fill in this form to get in touch

Please feel free to provide us with a copy of any relevant documentation.
Upload up to 3 files, max file size 2MB. Accepted file types: jpg,jpeg,doc,docx,pdf,png,bmp,gif
